reviews.review_description: All hail Carlos Slim for providing us with this experience.

2018.12.31: This is a nice app, but short on duration, short on content, and short on options.

This is a completely automatic virtual tour of a handful of interesting and important art pieces. You can't pause, advance or rewind, you can't move to admire a specific piece, and it certainly leaves you wanting for more.

If you liked it, check out the MOCA app as well.
It's nice. Not a lot to see, not the best graphics and not the best controls/interface either. But it's a good concept.
